name: rbxts-transform-boost
description: roblox-ts transformer: automatic --!native, GetService hoisting, property chain caching, loop bounds hoisting, and Luau type annotation injection

scripts.bench:build: npm run build && cd bench && ~/.rokit/bin/rotor build
scripts.bench:rbxlx: npm run bench:build && npm run bench:build:baseline && cd bench && ~/.rokit/bin/rojo build benchmark.project.json -o benchmark.rbxlx
